campaign OFFICIAL PREDICTION GAME

EL RITMO DEL MUNDIAL

Join the ultimate prediction game. Predict scores, build your bracket, and climb the leaderboard.

How it Works

person_add

1. Invite Friends

Create a private group or join the global pool. Challenge your friends and colleagues to see who knows football best.

sports_soccer

2. Predict Scores

Lock in your predictions before kick-off. Guess the exact score to earn maximum points and boost your rank.

trophy

3. Win Big

Watch live matches and see your points update in real-time. Top the leaderboard to claim ultimate bragging rights.
